title: Deceitful, Mysterious Marie
overview: The misanthropic heir to a corporate empire loves his new robot maid. One small problem: she's secretly human.

title: Mistrusted Marie
overview: Marie grows flustered around Arthur, and he realizes something is up. How much longer can her secret keep?

title: Unmasked Marie
overview: Marie struggles to act out a convincing "Girlfriend Mode" for Arthur and runs afoul of a wily new assassin.

title: Lovestruck Marie
overview: Arthur refuses to rest despite a bad cold. Marie tries to help and confronts her feelings in the process.

title: Jealous Marie
overview: Marie struggles to keep her cool around Arthur now that she realizes how she feels about him.

title: Captive Marie
overview: Arthur's birthday sneaks up on Marie. When he reveals he loathes the day, she sets out to make it a happy one.

title: Martial Marie
overview: A boy named Daryl introduces himself as misanthropic Arthur's best friend. What is their connection really?

title: Tropical Marie
overview: Arthur kicks off summer break by taking Marie to a tropical island, but private moments prove hard to come by.

title: Deceitful, Mysterious, Exposed Marie
overview: With Arthur busy, Marie tries to befriend his fan club, but her plans to win them over soon misfire.

title: Resigned Marie
overview: Arthur is committed to keeping Marie's secret, but acting as oblivious as he used to proves a tall order.

title: Forgotten Marie
overview: Any pretense of secrecy ends when Arthur and Marie get locked in the bath together.

title: Goodbye, Marie
overview: Marie infiltrates Maynard's mansion in search of an antidote to the poison that took Arthur's memory.
